zh.lifeSummary: Petronilla of Shropshire於1398年出生在英國史洛普爾。她於1418年與Robert Leigh在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年在英國史洛普爾紐波特享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Shropshire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Shropshire): habitational name from the county of Shropshire, on the western border of England with Wales, which takes its name from Shrewsbury (recorded as Scrobbesbyrig in 1016; see Shrewsbury ), + Old English scīr ‘shire, district, county’.

variants.name: Shrewsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Shrewsbury (Shropshire), probably from Old English scrobb (genitive scrobbes), a variant of scrubb, scrybb ‘shrub, brushwood’, + burg ‘fortress’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Petronilla of Shropshire was born in 1398, in Shropshire, England. She married Robert Leigh in 1418, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1461, in Newport, Shropshire, England, at the age of 63.

ko.Langley, Shropshire, England, United Kin: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 랭글리 비 미슨
ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla of Shropshire(은)는 1398년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1418년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 Robert Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 슈럽실르 뉴포트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Petronilla of Shropshire родилась в 1398 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Leigh в 1418 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности нюпорт, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
